mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lottery_result(lottery_type, draw_num, draw_date, numbers, extra_info, fetched_at, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by) VALUES(#{lotteryType}, #{drawNum}, #{drawDate}, #{numbers}, #{extraInfo}, #{fetchedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedAt}, #{updatedBy}) ON CONFLICT(lottery_type, draw_num) DO UPDATE SET draw_date = excluded.draw_date, numbers = excluded.numbers, extra_info = excluded.extra_info, fetched_at = excluded.fetched_at, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, updated_by = excluded.updated_by

INSERT INTO lottery_result(lottery_type, draw_num, draw_date, numbers, extra_info, fetched_at, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by) VALUES(#{lotteryType}, #{drawNum}, #{drawDate}, #{numbers}, #{extraInfo}, #{fetchedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedAt}, #{updatedBy}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE draw_date = VALUES(draw_date), numbers = VALUES(numbers), extra_info = VALUES(extra_info), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lottery_result WHERE lottery_type = #{type} AND draw_num = #{drawNum}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lottery_result WHERE lottery_type = #{type}
SELECT * FROM lottery_result WHERE lottery_type = #{type} AND draw_num = #{drawNum}
mapper.insert:
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO lottery_result(lottery_type, draw_num, draw_date, numbers, extra_info, fetched_at, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by) VALUES
(#{item.lotteryType}, #{item.drawNum}, #{item.drawDate}, #{item.numbers}, #{item.extraInfo}, #{item.fetchedAt}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedAt}, #{item.updatedBy})

INSERT IGNORE INTO lottery_result(lottery_type, draw_num, draw_date, numbers, extra_info, fetched_at, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by) VALUES
(#{item.lotteryType}, #{item.drawNum}, #{item.drawDate}, #{item.numbers}, #{item.extraInfo}, #{item.fetchedAt}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedAt}, #{item.updatedBy})
mapper.select: SELECT lottery_type AS type, COUNT(*) AS count, MAX(draw_num) AS latestDrawNum, MAX(draw_date) AS latestDrawDate FROM lottery_result GROUP BY lottery_type
